$schema_note: Companion data for experimental/notes/l1/l1_ell19_band_refuted.md; verified by experimental/scripts/verify_l1_ell19_band_refuted.py. NEW file: does not touch the already-integrated experimental/data/certificates/l1-ell19/l1_ell19_witnesses.json.
law: vacancy half of the L1 prime-ell frontier law m*(ell) = (ell+1)/2 -- REFUTED at ell=19 by this witness
m_star_19_exact_status: OPEN: m*(19) in {8, 9} (top-8=36<38 for this gamma rules out only this witness at m=8, not every gamma)

supersedes.experimental/notes/l1/l1_ell19_attainmen: its title and Sec 5 closing claim 'm*(19) <= 10 unconditionally, and equality m*(19) = 10 exactly to the extent the vacancy half holds'; its own m=10 (p=647) and m=11 (p=647) witnesses SURVIVE unchanged as earlier rungs of the attainment ladder
its Sec 4 named falsifier ('a listing-eligible witness with E_3=ell+2 concentrated as in W3 would refute the vacancy band outright'); ATTAINED and REFINED here: top-m>=2ell is the true requirement, E_3=ell+1 (not ell+2) suffices given two extra size-2 fibers; its six counterexamples and Theorem 1 SURVIVE unchanged

definitions.gamma: constant-free mixed poly Gamma(X) = sum_{r=1}^{ell-1} gamma_r X^r over F_p; gamma_X1_to_Xell_minus_1 lists coefficients of X^1..X^(ell-1) in order
definitions.spectrum: per-coset max fiber (level-set) size of Gamma restricted to each of the n=(p-1)/ell cosets of the order-ell subgroup, sorted descending
definitions.E3: sum_b max(mu_b - 2, 0) over the spectrum (aggregate excess above pairwise-legal size 2)
definitions.T_third_onward_excess: sum_{k>=3} max(mu_k - 2, 0) computed on the descending spectrum starting from the THIRD-largest entry onward (sigma-calculus Theorem 1 quantity; T<=4 is the proved-covered chart, T>=5 the residual/conjectural chart; see experimental/notes/l1/l1_sigma_calculus.md)
definitions.top_m: sum of the m largest spectrum entries
definitions.a_reduction_param: number of non-planted cosets simultaneously carrying a size->=3 fiber at the extremal family member (key reduction formula, see key_reduction_formula below)

witness.label: m=9=(ell-1)/2 vacancy-band-refutation witness (this note's headline; one below the (ell+1)/2 onset)

provenance.method: plant-one-big-fiber (size ell-3=16) + exhaustive triple-collision-tally over all non-planted cosets; deterministic, no seed anywhere (exhaustive, not sampled)
provenance.crossing_condition: a_cosets >= 6 (key reduction formula top_m = 2*ell-6+a at m=(ell-1)/2)
provenance.coverage_this_ell: 8 eligible ell=19 primes swept (419,457,571,647,761,1103,1217,1483); p=571 is the unique crossing (a=6); all others plateau at a<=5 (top-9=37=2ell-1)
provenance.note: reverified 4 independent ways pre-ship: plant-reconstruction from the dropset, from-scratch spectrum recount with explicit fibers exhibited, the 16-gate run_witness_chain (determinism), and eligibility; see experimental/scripts/l1_ell19_triple_tally.py.

key_reduction_formula.formula: with a planted size-(ell-3) fiber at m=(ell-1)/2: top_m <= 2*ell - 6 + a (non-planted fibers <= 3 by the pairwise cap), a = #cosets simultaneously carrying a size-3 fiber at the family member; EQUALITY iff >= (m-1-a) further size-2 fibers; crossing requires a >= 6 (necessary), and a >= 6 plus the size-2 proviso suffices
key_reduction_formula.crossing_iff: a >= 6 necessary; a >= 6 AND >= (m-1-a) size-2 fibers sufficient
key_reduction_formula.status: EXPERIMENTAL, coverage-scoped empirical formula for one plant shape; no general law conjectured

ell17.exhaustive_confirmation: all-C(17,3)=680-dropset check at p=307: max_top_m=33, equals the 24-orbit-representative-per-prime search's own max (loss-free reduction confirmed)

concurrent_integration_note: This note and its verifier/engine/certificate ship in a single new PR against upstream/main (post-integration commit 0fa9427, 'Integrate L1 and M1 experimental PR packets'), which already contains the integrated forms of l1_ell19_attainment.md and l1_e3_law_refuted.md verbatim (byte-identical to their pre-integration PR content). Neither integrated note, its verifier, nor its certificate JSON (l1_ell19_witnesses.json) is modified by this PR.
